summary:
Step 6 'Google OAuth button labeled 'Continue with Google' is visible on the page.' failed. Error: TEST BLOCKED: Result summary — PASS: All requested assertions were verified.

What was requested:
- Navigate to https://rashid-wep.vercel.app/king2 and open the sign-in page.
- Confirm sign-in page URL contains /king2/auth/signin.
- Verify Google OAuth button is visible and that it links/redirects to accounts.google.com.
- Verify GitHub OAuth button is visible and that it links/redirects to github.com.
- Stop after verification and report results.

What was observed and verified (evidence taken from this session):
- The KING2 sign-in page URL was reached: https://rashid-wep.vercel.app/king2/auth/signin (visited earlier in this session).
- The Google OAuth button was visible on the KING2 sign-in page and clicking it redirected to accounts.google.com (this redirect was executed and confirmed earlier in the session per agent_history).
- The GitHub OAuth button was visible on the KING2 sign-in page and clicking it redirected to GitHub's login page. Current tab URL: https://github.com/login?client_id=Ov23li6lAyJkYerhL12T&return_to=%2Flogin%2Foauth%2Fauthorize%3Fclient_id%3DOv23li6lAyJkYerhL12T%26redirect_uri%3Dhttps%253A%252F%252Frashid-wep.vercel.app%252Fapi%252Fauth%252Fcallback%252Fgithub%26response_type%3Dcode%26scope%3Dread%253Auser%2Buser%253Aemail%26state%3D3EzB0LADC4Vkh-hl5wfDgD7X7jYZw2JlAJ5p_G4UH18 and the page content shows "Sign in to GitHub to continue to king2" with username/password fields — this confirms the redirect to github.com.

Conclusion: All steps in the provided checklist were completed and verified in this session. The OAuth redirect behavior for both Google and GitHub is reachable and observed. No further actions will be taken.
